## Safety checklist

- [ ] No BIOS, firmware, ZIP, CAP, ROM, BIN or EXE files added.
- [ ] URLs use HTTPS.
- [ ] URLs point only to official vendor domains.
- [ ] MSI board-id checked when available.
- [ ] Gigabyte revision handled when applicable.
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_catalog.py` passes.
